title: SPECTRUM SBSCDC Dual Battery Charger, 40V 2A Fast Charger
description_html: Experience efficient charging with this SPECTRUM 40V 2A dual battery fast charger (Model SBSCDC ). This versatile charger is designed to power up two batteries simultaneously, optimising your workflow and reducing downtime. The compact unit, measuring 20x17x9cm, delivers reliable performance while maintaining a practical footprint. Built with durability in mind, this charger comes in a robust housing that’s suitable for both professional and home use. The thoughtful design includes safety features to protect your batteries during the charging process. Each inner package includes the charger unit with complete setup instructions, whilst the outer carton configuration makes it ideal for bulk storage and transport. Perfect for users who rely on 40V battery-powered tools and need a dependable charging solution to keep their equipment ready for action.

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• 2–5 day delivery included.
  • Fast 40V charger capable of charging two batteries simultaneously with a 2.0A output.
  • Compact 20 × 17 × 9 cm design ideal for workshop or garage storage.
  • Robust EBC42 construction for reliable, professional‑grade performance.
  • Dual charging ports improve efficiency and reduce downtime.
  • Lightweight 750g build for easy transport between work locations.
metafields.custom.bullet_two: Fast 40V charger capable of charging two batteries simultaneously with a 2.0A output.
metafields.custom.bullet_three: Compact 20 × 17 × 9 cm design ideal for workshop or garage storage.

title: SPECTRUM SBS20CB 40V Lithium-Ion Battery Pack, 2.0Ah
description_html:
SPECTRUM 40V 2.0Ah Battery Pack
Power up your outdoor tools with the SPECTRUM SBS20CB 40V 2.0Ah battery pack. Built with reliable 18650 lithium‑ion cells, this compact and lightweight 710g battery delivers steady, consistent power for Spectrum electric‑start mowers and compatible power tools. Its space‑efficient 8×9×14.5 cm design fits seamlessly into 40V garden equipment while maintaining optimal performance. Engineered for both home and professional use, provides dependable output throughout the entire discharge cycle and arrives in secure packaging for safe storage and transport. A robust, long‑lasting power solution from Spectrum’s trusted range of outdoor equipment accessories.

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• 2 -5 Working Day Delivery
  • 40 Volt Battery
  • Reusable
  • Compact Size

title: SPECTRUM SBS220CHM Cordless Handy Mower (Tool Only)
description_html:
SPECTRUM SBS220CHM Self Propelled Cordless Lawn Mower

Lightweight, compact and easy to handle, the Spectrum SBS220CHM is designed for effortless lawn care in smaller gardens. Weighing just 3.8kg, this mower is incredibly easy to manoeuvre, making it ideal for quick tidy-ups and navigating tighter spaces with minimal effort.

Equipped with a high-efficiency brushless motor, the SBS220CHM delivers reliable performance, longer runtime and reduced maintenance. Its smart, handy design and flexible handle push control provide a comfortable user experience, while the 22cm (9″) cutting deck ensures a neat and precise finish.

The mower features a 3-stage central height adjustment system, allowing you to easily select cutting heights between 30mm and 50mm to suit your lawn. A built-in mulching function finely cuts and redistributes grass clippings back onto the lawn, helping to promote healthier growth.

With an idle speed of 6000rpm and a stable wheel configuration (6″ front, 3″ rear), this mower offers smooth operation and dependable cutting performance in a compact form.

Battery & Charging Options:
This is a tool-only model, giving you full flexibility to choose your preferred power setup. Compatible with optional 2Ah or 4Ah batteries, along with standard, fast, or dual charger options.

Key Features:

  • Ultra-lightweight design – only 3.8kg

  • Brushless motor for enhanced efficiency and durability

  • Compact 22cm cutting width – perfect for small lawns

  • 3-stage central height adjustment (30–50mm)

  • Mulching function for improved lawn health

  • Easy hand-push operation with flexible handle control

  • Compact and easy to store

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• Mulches the grass
  • Cordless Battery Lawnmower
  • Handheld Mower
  • Easy manoeuvrability
  • Weighs only 3.6kg
  • Delivery 2- 5 Working Days
  • Extended five-year manufacturer’s warranty
  • See below in the Bundle for your battery and charger options

title: SPECTRUM SBS450CHT Cordless Hedge Trimmer, Battery Powered, 48V (Tool only)
description_html:
Spectrum SBS450CHT Cordless Hedge Trimmer (Tool Only)

Maintain clean, sharp hedges with ease using the SBS450CHT Cordless Hedge Trimmer – a lightweight yet powerful tool designed for precision cutting and user comfort. Ideal for shaping and maintaining hedges of all sizes, this trimmer delivers professional results without the restriction of cables.

Powered by a high-efficiency brushless motor, the SBS450CHT offers improved performance, longer runtime, and increased durability. The laser-cut blade, available in 450mm or 560mm lengths, ensures clean and accurate cuts, while the 18mm cutting capacity makes light work of thicker branches.

With a blade speed of 2600 cuts per minute, this hedge trimmer provides fast, smooth cutting action for efficient garden maintenance. The 90° rotating handle enhances comfort and control, allowing you to easily switch between vertical and horizontal cutting positions.

Weighing just 2.91kg, the SBS450CHT is designed for easy handling, reducing fatigue during extended use.

Please note: This is a tool-only product. Batteries and chargers are available separately as optional extras, allowing you to choose the setup that best suits your needs.

A reliable and easy-to-use solution for hedge maintenance, the SBS450CHT Cordless Hedge Trimmer is perfect for keeping your garden looking its best.

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• Cordless design for unrestricted movement
  • Tool-only unit (battery and charger sold separately)
  • High-performance brushless motor for efficiency and durability
  • 60mm blade length
  • 18mm cutting capacity for tackling thicker growth
  • Durable laser-cut blades for precise, clean cuts
  • Fast 2600/min blade speed for efficient trimming
  • 90° rotating handle for improved comfort and versatility
  • Lightweight design at just 2.91kg
  • Delivery 2 – 5 working days
metafields.custom.bullet_two: Tool-only unit (battery and charger sold separately)
metafields.custom.bullet_three: High-performance brushless motor for efficiency and durability
